---
name: Question about the standard
about: This template provides a standard format for questions about the wdds standard
title: ''
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the issue you are having the with the standard
Provide context for your question and mention specific components of the standard that you would like clarification on. 

example: I am having a hard time distinguishing between properties X and Y. My study involves AAA where we collected data with the field Z that does not fall neatly into X or Y but mingles both properties. For more context see the methods [here](www.example.com/myDataMethods). 

## Proposed change
If you think the standard needs to be modified or expanded please describe the changes you would like to see here.

example: The description and examples in X property should clarify the difference between X and Y.
